mapper.select: SELECT s.*, u.nickname FROM sleep_record s LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sleep_record(user_id, sleep_start, sleep_end, duration, quality, record_date, remark) VALUES(#{userId}, #{sleepStart}, #{sleepEnd}, #{duration}, #{quality}, #{recordDate}, #{remark})
